info.title: Contract Redline Tool
info.description: Redlines Word contracts with tracked changes and rationale comments based on AI agent recommendations. Designed for Copilot Studio integration.

post.summary: Redline a contract with tracked changes
post.description: Downloads a Word document from SharePoint, applies tracked changes (insertions/deletions) based on the provided recommendations, adds Word comments with rationale for each change, and uploads the redlined document back to SharePoint.

ChangeResult.title: ChangeResult
ChangeResult.description: Result of applying a single change.

original_text.title: Original Text
original_text.description: The exact text in the contract to find and replace

replacement_text.title: Replacement Text
replacement_text.description: The new text to insert (tracked as insertion). Leave empty string to only delete.

rationale.title: Rationale
rationale.description: Explanation for the change, added as a Word comment

risk_level.description: Risk severity: major, moderate, or minor

section.title: Section
section.description: Optional: the contract section where this change applies

Recommendation.title: Recommendation
Recommendation.description: A single recommended change to apply to the contract.

document_url.title: Document Url
document_url.description: Full URL to the Word document in SharePoint

author.title: Author
author.description: Author name for tracked changes and comments

output_filename.title: Output Filename
output_filename.description: Optional output filename. If empty, appends '_redlined' to original name.

output_folder_url.title: Output Folder Url
output_folder_url.description: Optional SharePoint folder URL for the redlined document. If empty, uploads to the same folder as the source document.

RedlineRequest.title: RedlineRequest
RedlineRequest.description: Request to redline a SharePoint Word document with tracked changes.

output_url.title: Output Url
output_url.description: URL to the redlined document in SharePoint

changes_applied.title: Changes Applied
changes_applied.description: Number of tracked changes successfully applied

changes_failed.title: Changes Failed
changes_failed.description: Number of changes that could not be applied

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: Human-readable summary of the redline operation
